doc: Per-path allowlist for UNKNOWN-classified long-lived artifacts that are intentionally retained. Each entry must justify why the path is exempt from the LIVE_STATE/HISTORICAL_PROVENANCE/LIVE_RECIPE/DERIVED_OUTPUT taxonomy. Entries here are ALLOWED to bypass `audit_unregistered_long_lived_artifacts`. Adding a path here is a deliberate operator choice, NOT a default. Sister gate is `check_artifact_lifecycle_compliance` (catalog #113) wired strict; FIX-4 (catalog #117) extends it with the enumerate-unregistered audit landed 2026-05-08.
